items.title: Amgen (AMGN) Rises As Market Takes a Dip: Key Facts
items.description: The latest trading day saw Amgen (AMGN) settling at $325.31, representing a +2.38% change from its previous close.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips As Trump Eyes This Fed Pick; Defense Stock Tests Entry (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Monday. Tesla neared a buy point while President Trump edged closer to a Fed chair pick.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Edges Up As Tesla Jumps Near Buy Point, Apple Lags (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Monday but Apple stock lagged. Tesla raced higher, nearing a buy point.

items.title: Argenx Halts Phase 3 Thyroid Eye Disease Trial, Peers Like Viridian Therapeutics To Benefit
items.description: Argenx discontinues its Phase 3 UplighTED trial in thyroid eye disease after an interim futility review, while analysts maintain confidence in Vyvgart's broader growth.
